Cheat Sheet for TopSky

Shortcut Function Remarks
<ALT> + <C> Reposition cursor at the center of the radar screen -
<ALT> + <E> Open FPL Selection Window -
<ALT> + <F> Open FPL Window for the selected flight -
<ALT> + <L> Display the Flight Leg for the selected flight for 5 seconds -
<ALT> + <P> Start a new flight plan minimum separation line -
<ALT> + <S> Start a new minimum separation line -
<ALT> + <Q> Start new QDM line -
<ALT> + <X> Remove all QDM lines -
<ALT> + <U> Inhibit active filters for 5 seconds (Quick Look) -
<ALT> + <1>…<0> Toggle a specified map or transfer the selected flight to a defined controller -
